meta.title: AI Educademy, Free AI Education for Everyone
meta.description: Learn Artificial Intelligence from scratch, in your language. No coding experience needed.

hero.title: Learn AI.
hero.subtitle: Free interactive lessons that take you from curious beginner to confident builder. No coding, no maths, no barriers.

features.title: Designed for Absolute Beginners
features.subtitle: No coding, no maths, no prerequisites. We start from zero.

beginner.title: Start from Zero
beginner.description: Never touched code? Good. We use everyday language and real-world examples, how Netflix recommends films, how your phone recognises your face.

interactive.title: Learn by Doing
interactive.description: Hands-on experiments in your browser. Train an AI to recognise drawings, teach a chatbot, see results instantly.

multilingual.title: In Your Language
multilingual.description: Learn in Hindi, Telugu, French, Dutch, or English, whichever feels like home.

free.title: Free Forever
free.description: No subscriptions, no paywalls. Open-source, community-built, free forever.

community.title: Learn Together
community.description: Ask questions, share experiments, help translate lessons.

practical.title: Real-World AI
practical.description: How AI powers search engines, voice assistants, social feeds, self-driving cars, and medical diagnosis.

founder.description: Engineer and tech lead with a decade of building systems across India, Belgium, and the UK. Founded AI Educademy to make AI education free and accessible, in every language, for every background.
founder.role: Founder · Engineering Leader · Open Source Advocate

footer.tagline: Free AI education for everyone, in every language.

about.title: About AI Educademy
about.missionText: AI education for every student, regardless of language, background, or experience.
about.storyText1: I'm Ramesh Reddy Adutla, an engineering leader with 15 years across fintech, media, and retail, building large-scale systems at global giants like JP Morgan, Sky, and Marks & Spencer across Asia and Europe. Currently based in London, helping one of the UK's biggest retailers digitalise their technology estate.
about.storyText2: AI will reshape every industry. Yet the best AI education remains locked behind expensive institutions in a handful of countries. That gap isn't just unfair, it's a massive waste of potential.
about.storyText3: A conversation about millions of students being left behind sparked this. AI Educademy started as a side project, it grew into something real.
about.storyText4: Working across multiple countries where English isn't the first language made one thing clear: language should never be a barrier to learning. I speak English, French, and Telugu, so building a multilingual platform felt like the obvious move.

value1.title: Accessible
value1.description: If you can open a web browser, you can learn AI. No special software, no powerful computer needed.

value2.title: Inclusive
value2.description: Education in your language, with examples from your culture. AI isn't just a Silicon Valley thing.

value3.title: Honest
value3.description: We teach what AI can do AND what it can't. No hype, no fear, just understanding.

value4.title: Open
value4.description: Every lesson, every line of code is open source. Fork it, translate it, improve it.

about.subtitle: Founder · Engineering Leader · Open Source Advocate
about.timeline2011: Started career in software engineering in India 🇮🇳
about.timeline2014: Moved to Belgium, built fintech systems, learned French 🇧🇪
about.timeline2017: JP Morgan, trading platforms and high-performance systems ��
about.timeline2019: Sky, streaming platform serving millions of users 📺
about.timeline2021: Cloud-native microservices and data pipelines at scale 🛒
about.timeline2024: Open-source contributions, Apache Gravitino, GOV.UK, Spring Boot MCP 🌐
about.timeline2025: Founded AI Educademy, free AI education for everyone 🎓
about.pageDescription: AI Educademy is a free, open-source AI education platform built for everyone. Learn about our mission to make AI education accessible worldwide.
about.pageSubtitle: Free, open-source AI education for every student.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.subtitle: Every lesson builds on the last. No rush, no assumptions.

programs.title: Choose Your Learning Path
programs.subtitle: Pick the level that matches where you are.
programs.trackAIDesc: Grow from zero to AI expert, nature-inspired progression
programs.trackCraftDesc: Ace your dream interview, workshop-inspired mastery
programs.trackCraftBrand: Learn the algorithms that power AI, design the systems that scale AI, and ace the interviews that land you AI-era jobs.
programs.pageDescription: Explore our free AI learning tracks and software engineering programmes. From absolute beginner to advanced, learn at your own pace in 5 languages.

homePrograms.trackAIHome: Grow from zero to AI expert

programDetail.comingSoonDesc: We're crafting these lessons with care. Check back soon!

community.openSourceDesc: Built openly, view code, contribute, or fork

lab.title: AI Lab
lab.subtitle: Experiment with real AI concepts right in your browser. No installation, no coding, just play and learn!
lab.pageDescription: Experiment with AI concepts. Analyse sentiment, visualise neural networks, explore sorting algorithms, and understand tokenisation.
lab.footer: All demos run entirely in your browser, no data is sent to any server.

sorting.label: Sorting Algorithms
sorting.desc: Watch algorithms sort in real time

tokenizer.label: Tokeniser
tokenizer.desc: See how AI reads your text

aiOrHuman.title: Can You Tell the Difference?
aiOrHuman.description: Read {count} text snippets and guess whether each was written by a human or generated by AI. It's harder than you think.

common.avgDistance: Average distance from actual token count
common.reviewedBias: You reviewed {count} bias scenarios. Understanding bias is the first step to building fairer AI.
common.notQuiteTimeline: Not quite, here's the correct timeline:

emojiDecoder.title: Emoji Decoder
emojiDecoder.instruction: What AI concept do these emojis represent?

binaryTranslator.title: Binary Translator
binaryTranslator.instruction: Decode the binary into a word
binaryTranslator.hint: Hint: Each 8-digit group = one letter (A=65, B=66...)

speedTyper.title: Speed Typer
speedTyper.instruction: Type the AI term as fast as you can!

memoryMatch.title: Memory Match
memoryMatch.instruction: Match each AI term with its definition

aiTimeline.title: AI Timeline
aiTimeline.instruction: Tap events in chronological order (earliest first)

biasDetective.title: Bias Detective
biasDetective.instruction: Read the scenario and spot the bias

tokenCounter.title: Token Counter
tokenCounter.instruction: How many tokens does an LLM see?

aiTrivia.title: AI Trivia Challenge
aiTrivia.instruction: Test your knowledge of AI history, concepts, and famous figures!
aiTrivia.noScores: No scores yet. Be the first!

neuralNetwork.title: Neural Network Sandbox
neuralNetwork.instruction: Place data points and train a neural network to classify them

promptDojo.title: Prompt Engineering Dojo
promptDojo.instruction: Craft the perfect prompt to match the target output

algoRace.title: Algorithm Race
algoRace.instruction: Bet on a sorting algorithm and watch them race!

sentimentSection.title: Sentiment Analysis
sentimentSection.description: Analyse the emotional tone of any text using keyword-based NLP, runs entirely in your browser.
sentimentSection.placeholder: Type or paste any text to analyse its sentiment...

neuralSection.title: Neural Network Visualiser
neuralSection.description: Watch data flow through a neural network. Adjust inputs and see activations propagate.
neuralSection.explanation: Adjust the input sliders and click Forward Pass to watch data propagate through the network. Blue connections are positive weights, red are negative. Thicker lines mean stronger connections.

sortingSection.title: Sorting Algorithm Visualiser
sortingSection.description: Compare Bubble Sort, Quick Sort, and Merge Sort side by side.

tokenizerSection.title: AI Tokeniser
tokenizerSection.description: See how LLMs break text into tokens, the fundamental units AI processes.
tokenizerSection.placeholder: Type text to see how AI breaks it into tokens...
tokenizerSection.explanation: AI doesn't read text like humans. It breaks text into tokens, subword pieces processed individually. Longer words get split into smaller chunks.

hub.title: AI Lab
hub.subtitle: Interactive AI games and tools. No coding needed, just play and learn.
